Unit Ability Description: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", add 1 to Attacks of melee weapons in that unit.
Eligible to declare a charge in a turn it Advanced.
While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", add 1 to Hit rolls for melee attacks made by models in that unit.
At end of Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll 8D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
While leading a unit, melee weapons in that unit have DEVASTATING WOUNDS.
Each time this model makes an attack targeting a Character unit, re-roll Hit roll and Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy Character unit, gain 1CP.
While leading a unit, add 1 to Wound rolls for attacks made by models in that unit.
Each time this model's unit Consolidates, it can move up to 6" instead of 3".
While leading a unit, each time that unit ends a Charge move, until end of turn, Juggernaut's bladed horns in that unit have DEVASTATING WOUNDS.
Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range must take a Battle-shock test.
At start of Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18" and visible. Until end of phase, friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica attacks targeting that unit improve S, AP, and D by 1.
Each time this model makes a melee attack targeting a Character or Monster, re-roll Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy Character or Monster, regain up to D6 lost wounds.
While leading a unit, re-roll Advance and Charge rolls for that unit.
At start of first battle round, select one enemy unit as prey. Re-roll Wound rolls targeting that prey. When prey is destroyed, select a new prey.

Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. If also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from those tests.
Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll 1D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
At end of opponent's turn, if not within Engagement Range of enemy units, can remove from battlefield and place into Strategic Reserves.
After shooting, select one enemy unit hit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.
Area within 6" of this Fortification is within your Shadow of Chaos. While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", re-roll Battle-shock tests for that unit.
standard Benefit of Cover rule for models not fully visible due to this Fortification.

standard fortification rules (enemy units only within Engagement Range: ranged attacks still allowed but -1 Hit roll unless Pistol; no Desperate Escape tests for Fall Back while Battle-shocked except for those moving over enemy models).
While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
At end of your Command phase, if on battlefield, take LD test; if passed, gain 1CP.
Once per turn, when opponent targets a unit within 12" of this model with a stratagem, you can increase the CP cost of that stratagem by 1CP.
While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", add 1 to S for ranged attacks made by models in that unit.
In Shooting phase, select one of: IGNORES COVER, LETHAL HITS, or SUSTAINED HITS D3. Until end of phase, Bolt of Change has that ability.

Each time an enemy unit wishes to target this model, that unit must first take a Battle-shock test. If failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that enemy unit cannot target this model this phase.

At start of opponent's Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" and visible; roll 1D6: on 2-5, subtract 1 from Hit rolls for models in that unit until end of phase; on 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.
While leading a unit, melee weapons in that unit have LETHAL HITS.
Once per battle, at end of opponent's turn, if not within Engagement Range of enemy units, can remove this model's unit from battlefield and place into Strategic Reserves.
While leading a unit, subtract 1 from Hit rolls for attacks targeting that unit.
Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, Wound roll, or saving throw is made for this model, can change the result to an unmodified 6.
While an enemy unit is within 12", subtract 1 from Wound rolls for Psychic Attacks made by models in that unit.
At end of your Movement phase, roll 1D6 for each enemy unit within 6": on 2-3, 1 mortal wound; on 4-5, D3 mortal wounds; on 6, D6 mortal wounds.
While leading a unit, ranged weapons in that unit have SUSTAINED HITS 1.
After shooting, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more attacks; that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Each time a Blue Horror model is destroyed, after the attacking unit finishes making attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll 1D6 for that model. On 4+, add one Brimstone Horror model to this unit.
While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit and this unit contains one or more Blue Horror models, worsen LD of models in that enemy unit by 1.

Each time this unit is selected to fight, can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range, then select one or more Brimstone Horror models; for each, roll 1D6: on 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Each time a Pink Horror or Blue Horror model is destroyed, after attacking unit finishes, roll 1D6 for that model. On 4+: if Pink Horror, add two Blue Horror models; if Blue Horror, add one Brimstone Horror model. HORRORS ARE PINK. HORRORS ARE BLUE. WHERE ONCE THERE WAS ONE, NOW THERE ARE TWO — If at any point this unit contains no Pink Horror models, use the Blue Horrors datasheet for this unit. While the unit contains one or more Pink Horror models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit.
Eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
While leading a unit, ranged weapons in that unit have ASSAULT.

After shooting, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more attacks; roll 1D6. On 4+, until end of opponent's next turn, that enemy unit is aflame: subtract 2" from Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls.
In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, select one enemy unit it moved over and roll 1D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
After shooting, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks. Until end of phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.
While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
At start of Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 24" and visible. Until end of phase, Nurgle Legiones Daemonica model attacks allocated to that unit add 1 to D characteristic.
While an enemy unit is within 6", subtract 2 from Move and subtract 1 from OC of models in that unit.
While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", add 1 to Toughness of models in that unit.
At end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12". Until start of your next Movement phase, subtract 1 from Toughness of models in that unit.

While leading a unit, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit for melee attacks in that unit. Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic) — While an enemy unit is within 6", subtract 1 from its Battle-shock tests.
While leading a unit, melee weapons in that unit have SUSTAINED HITS 1.
While leading a unit, add 1 to OC of models in that unit.
While leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
Keep a tally of enemy models destroyed by Nurgle Legiones Daemonica models from your army. At start of your Command phase, if tally is 7 or more, gain 1CP and reset tally to 0.
While leading a unit, add 1 to Move of models in that unit and re-roll Advance rolls for that unit.
At start of Fight phase, every enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 6" must take a Battle-shock test.

While leading a unit, re-roll charge rolls for that unit. Once per battle, can target this unit with Heroic Intervention stratagem regardless of other uses this phase (-1CP, does not prevent other uses).
At end of your Movement phase, if this model is within one Area Terrain feature, until end of battle, that Area Terrain feature is within your Shadow of Chaos.

If you control an objective marker at end of your Command phase and this unit is within range, that objective marker remains under your control even if you have no models within range, until opponent controls it at start or end of any turn.

Each time an enemy unit (excluding Titanic units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, subtract 1 from Hit rolls for melee attacks in that enemy unit until end of phase.
At end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all lost wounds.
After shooting, select one enemy unit hit. Until end of turn, friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica models can re-roll Wound rolls for attacks targeting that unit.
While a friendly Nurgle Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", models in that unit have the Stealth ability.
standard Benefit of Cover rule.

While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
Re-roll Advance and Charge rolls for this model.
At start of first battle round, select one enemy unit as quarry. Re-roll Hit and Wound rolls for attacks targeting quarry. When quarry is destroyed, select new quarry.
While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", that unit is within your Shadow of Chaos.
While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", improve AP of melee weapons in that unit by 1.
Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from Hit roll.
While leading a unit, in your Command phase, return D3 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.
While an enemy Psyker unit is within 12", Psychic weapons in that unit have HAZARDOUS.

At start of Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 6". Until end of phase: friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica models add 1 to Wound rolls targeting that unit; models in that enemy unit subtract 1 from Wound rolls for melee attacks.
Eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.
While leading a unit, a successful unmodified Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound for melee attacks in that unit.
First time this model is destroyed, roll 1D6 at end of phase. On 2+, set this model back up with full wounds, not within Engagement Range of enemy units.
While leading a unit, models in that unit have Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

At start of opponent's Shooting phase, one Psyker model from your army with this ability can use it. Select one enemy unit within 12" and visible; roll 1D6: on 1, that Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on 2-5, subtract 1 from Hit rolls for models in that enemy unit until end of phase; on 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.
While a friendly Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", melee weapons in that unit have SUSTAINED HITS 1.
Each time a model in this model's unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it. The destroyed model can fight after attacking unit finishes, then is removed.
Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve S and D of that attack by 1.
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If target is within range of an objective marker, re-roll the Hit roll instead.

At end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12". Until end of turn, Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica models making attacks targeting that unit can re-roll Hit and Wound rolls.
At start of Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from result if Below Half-strength.

Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. If also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each test.
Re-roll Advance and Charge rolls for this unit.
The area within 6" of this model is within your Shadow of Chaos.
At start of battle round, select one Shadow Form ability. Until end of battle round, this model has that ability.
Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over friendly Monster and Vehicle models and terrain features 4" or less in height as if they were not there.
While within 3" of one or more friendly Legiones Daemonica Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.
While a friendly Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6", models in that unit have the Stealth ability.
Once per battle, at start of any phase, this model can use this ability. Until end of phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save.
Once per battle, at start of Fight phase, add 3 to A of hellforged weapons until end of phase.
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of: LETHAL HITS, PRECISION, or SUSTAINED HITS 1. Until end of phase, hellforged weapons have that ability.
